headline: How the Iran Conflict Could Pressure Consumer Staples Companies
summary: Supply chains could be disrupted, costs could go up, and demand could weaken. But an analyst still expects staples stocks to outperform.

headline: Explore the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index in today's session.
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets one hour before the close of the markets on Monday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's session.
